privileged_info_summary: The task requires rescheduling 'Strategic Partnership Review' to a 1-hour time slot on Wednesday between 13:00 (1:00 PM) and 17:00 (5:00 PM). Setup creates four blocking events: Lunch with Client (13:00-14:00), HR Quick Sync (14:00-14:30), Q3 Project Review (15:30-16:30), and Email & Admin (16:30-17:00). The first available 1-hour gap is 14:30-15:30, which is the target solution. All data is synthetic, created by xmlrpc.client in the setup script.
